bio_zh: 经济学博士，同济大学设计创意学院副教授、博士生导师。主要研究方向包括可持续设计、可持续消费行为、可持续发展经济学。主持《强可持续发展观》一书，在Design Journal、British Food Journal、Habitat International等国际期刊发表多篇论文。负责“晨光”和“扬帆”等人才培养项目。
bio_en: PhD in Economics, Associate Professor and PhD Supervisor at the College of Design and Innovation, Tongji University. His main research interests include sustainable design, sustainable consumer behavior, and sustainable development economics. He authored the book Strong Sustainable Development View and has published in international journals including Design Journal, British Food Journal, and Habitat International. He leads talent development programs including Chenguang and Yangfan.

achievements.description_zh: 《强可持续发展观》一书，系统阐述强可持续发展观的理论与实践。
achievements.description_en: A book systematically presenting the theory and practice of the strong sustainable development view.

achievements.description_zh: 发表于 Design Journal（AHCI），探讨可持续设计的定义与边界。
achievements.description_en: Published in Design Journal (AHCI), exploring the definition and boundaries of sustainable design.

achievements.description_zh: 发表于 British Food Journal（SCI IF 4.2），研究面向可持续消费行为的设计方法。
achievements.description_en: Published in British Food Journal (SCI IF 4.2), studying design methods for sustainable consumer behavior.

achievements.name_zh: 从增长到稳态——赫尔曼·戴利经济思想评述
achievements.name_en: From Growth to Steady State: A Review of Herman Daly's Economic Thought
achievements.description_zh: 发表于 CSSCI 期刊（IF 11.481），评述赫尔曼·戴利的稳态经济学思想。
achievements.description_en: Published in CSSCI journal (IF 11.481), reviewing Herman Daly's steady-state economics thought.

achievements.description_zh: 发表于 Habitat International（SSCI IF 7.0），研究社区微更新中的共创设计方法。
achievements.description_en: Published in Habitat International (SSCI IF 7.0), studying co-creation design methods in community micro-renewal.

courses.description_zh: 培养可持续发展的思维方式和设计理念。
courses.description_en: Cultivating ways of thinking and design concepts for sustainable development.

courses.name_zh: 可持续发展理论与研究方法
courses.name_en: Sustainable Development Theory and Research Methods
courses.description_zh: 系统介绍可持续发展的核心理论与研究方法。
courses.description_en: Systematic introduction to core theories and research methods of sustainable development.

courses.name_zh: 可持续发展经济学前沿研究
courses.name_en: Frontier Research in Sustainable Development Economics
courses.description_zh: 探讨可持续发展经济学的前沿话题。
courses.description_en: Exploring frontier topics in sustainable development economics.

courses.description_zh: 研究资源与环境的经济学分析方法。
courses.description_en: Studying economic analysis methods for resources and environment.

courses.name_zh: 可持续设计：思维和案例
courses.description_zh: 通过案例分析理解可持续设计的思维方式。
courses.description_en: Understanding sustainable design thinking through case analysis.

bio_en: PhD in Design from Politecnico di Milano, currently serving as Associate Research Fellow at Tongji University College of Design and Innovation. She is an active member of the DESIS Network, focusing on social innovation and service design. Her research explores design for vulnerable communities, including the Beyond Closed Doors project addressing hikikomori (social withdrawal) in South Korea, exhibited at the Gwangju Design Biennale. She curated the 7 Scenarios for Neighborhood of Care exhibition at Fuxin community center in 2021. She translated Ezio Manzini's influential design book into Korean, contributing to the dissemination of design-for-social-innovation knowledge in Korea.

achievements.name_zh: Beyond Closed Doors 居宅封闭项目
achievements.description_zh: 关注韩国“蛾族”现象的社会创新设计项目，于光州双年展展出。
achievements.description_en: A social innovation design project addressing hikikomori (social withdrawal) in South Korea, exhibited at the Gwangju Design Biennale.

achievements.name_zh: 7 Scenarios for Neighborhood of Care 展览
achievements.name_en: 7 Scenarios for Neighborhood of Care Exhibition
achievements.description_zh: 2021年在富鑫社区中心策展的“关怀邻里的七个场景”展览。
achievements.description_en: Curated the 7 Scenarios for Neighborhood of Care exhibition at Fuxin community center in 2021.

courses.description_zh: 介绍服务设计的核心方法论和实践工具。
courses.description_en: Introduction to core methodologies and practical tools of service design.

bio_zh: 东南大学建筑学背景，哈佛大学设计研究生院（GSD）访问学者。于2002年加入同济大学设计创意学院，现主要从事可持续设计与环境设计教学与研究。提出从“减少伤害”到“更多善意”的设计路径，关注城市可持续发展与人居环境设计。
bio_en: Background in Architecture from Southeast University and a visiting scholar at Harvard Graduate School of Design (GSD). Joined the College of Design and Innovation, Tongji University in 2002, focusing on sustainable design and environmental design teaching and research. Proposed a design approach from reducing harm to creating more goodness, with a focus on urban sustainable development and human settlement environmental design.

courses.description_zh: 培养学生对可持续设计的基本认知与理念。
courses.description_en: Cultivating students' fundamental awareness and concepts of sustainable design.

courses.description_zh: 探索再生设计的理论与实践方法。
courses.description_en: Exploring theory and practice methods of regenerative design.

bio_zh: 同济大学设计创意学院教授、博士生导师。具有工业设计、视觉传达和建筑设计多元学术背景。SEGD（环境图形设计协会）上海分会负责人，同时运营公共创新实验室。担任2022年世界设计之都大会策展人。研究方向包括环境设计、包容性设计与社会创新。
bio_en: Professor and PhD Supervisor at the College of Design and Innovation, Tongji University. He holds a multidisciplinary academic background spanning industrial design, visual communication, and architectural design. He is the head of SEGD (Society for Experiential Graphic Design) Shanghai Chapter and operates a Public Innovation Lab. He served as the curator for the 2022 World Design Cities Conference. His research interests include environmental design, inclusive design, and social innovation.

achievements.name_zh: SEGD上海分会及公共创新实验室
achievements.name_en: SEGD Shanghai Chapter and Public Innovation Lab
achievements.description_zh: 担任SEGD（环境图形设计协会）上海分会负责人，运营公共创新实验室。
achievements.description_en: Head of SEGD Shanghai Chapter and operates a Public Innovation Lab.

achievements.description_zh: 担任2022年世界设计之都大会策展人。
achievements.description_en: Served as the curator for the 2022 World Design Cities Conference.

courses.name_zh: 专业设计1：环境中的符号
courses.description_zh: 关注环境空间中符号系统的设计课程。
courses.description_en: A design studio focusing on sign systems in environmental space.

bio_en: Associate Professor of Design Practice and Vice Director of FabLab Shanghai at Tongji University College of Design and Innovation. Originally from Italy, he is a key figure in the global maker movement. He graduated from MIT Fab Academy and has been actively promoting digital fabrication, open-source hardware, and maker education. His Whatchamacallit methodology explores the intersection of design and making. His paper PCB for Designers received the Best Paper award at FAB23. His research bridges ecology, more-than-human design, and digital fabrication.

achievements.description_zh: 探索设计与制造交叉领域的创新方法论。
achievements.description_en: An innovative methodology exploring the intersection of design and making.

achievements.description_zh: 在FAB23大会上获得最佳论文奖。
achievements.description_en: Awarded Best Paper at FAB23 conference.

courses.description_zh: 教授开源硬件原理与编程实践。
courses.description_en: Teaching open source hardware principles and programming practice.

courses.description_zh: 为设计师讲解PCB设计与制作。
courses.description_en: Teaching PCB design and fabrication for designers.

courses.description_zh: 探索城市自然与数字制造的结合。
courses.description_en: Exploring the intersection of urban nature and digital fabrication.

bio_en: Professor at the College of Design and Innovation, Tongji University, originally from Finland. With a background from Aalto University, he brings extensive experience in environmental design, service design, and human-AI-robot collaboration. He developed the Space-Activity-Value framework for analyzing and designing spatial experiences. His School as a Service concept has been widely adopted in Finnish educational architecture. He co-founded Spacent, a platform for distributed workplace solutions, and co-leads the MIT Tongji City Science Lab. His teaching focuses on environmental design studios, service architecture workshops, and hybrid creativity workshops.

achievements.description_zh: 将教育空间作为服务进行设计的理念，广泛应用于芬兰教育建筑。
achievements.description_en: A concept of designing educational spaces as services, widely adopted in Finnish educational architecture.

achievements.description_zh: 共同创立的分布式工作场解决方案平台。
achievements.description_en: Co-founded a platform for distributed workplace solutions.

achievements.description_zh: 共同领导MIT同济城市科学实验室。
achievements.description_en: Co-leads the MIT Tongji City Science Lab.

courses.description_en: Studio course focusing on advanced environmental design projects.
Workshops exploring the intersection of service design and spatial architecture.
Workshops exploring hybrid creativity in design practice.

gallery.caption_en: School as a Service demonstration project

bio_zh: 欧盟玛丽·居里学者（Marie Skłodowska-Curie Fellow），同济大学设计创意学院研究员。参与Health CASCADE项目，专注于系统设计与医疗卫生领域。在Design Studies（2025）发表关于过渡设计模型的论文，在CoDesign（2025）发表关于医疗方案生态方法的论文。研究兴趣包括过渡设计、系统思维和健康创新。

achievements.description_zh: 发表于 Design Studies（2025），提出过渡设计的新模型。
achievements.description_en: Published in Design Studies (2025), proposing a new transition design model.

achievements.description_zh: 发表于 CoDesign（2025），提出医疗方案设计的生态系统方法。
achievements.description_en: Published in CoDesign (2025), proposing an ecological systems approach to healthcare solution design.

bio_zh: 建筑学博士，同济大学设计创意学院副教授、博士生导师。主要研究方向包括可持续设计、生态设计、生物声学与声音设计。SUSTAIN X项目负责人，CETA项目参与者，DEDESIS实验室成员，Soundlab负责人。研究兴趣涵盖热力学视角下的建筑原型设计、环境声学、以及系统性设计方法。
bio_en: PhD in Architecture, Associate Professor and PhD Supervisor at the College of Design and Innovation, Tongji University. Her main research interests include sustainable design, ecological design, bioacoustics, and sound design. She leads the SUSTAIN X project, participates in CETA, is a member of the DESIS Lab, and directs Soundlab. Her research covers building prototype design from a thermodynamic perspective, environmental acoustics, and systemic design methods.

achievements.name_zh: 《热力学视角下气候建筑原型方法研究》专著
achievements.name_en: Research on Climate Building Prototype Methods from a Thermodynamic Perspective (Book)
achievements.description_zh: 从热力学视角研究气候建筑原型方法的专著。
achievements.description_en: A monograph studying climate building prototype methods from a thermodynamic perspective.

courses.name_zh: 专业设计3：环境作为系统
courses.description_zh: 将环境理解为复杂系统的设计课程。
courses.description_en: A design studio understanding environment as a complex system.

courses.description_zh: 教授设计研究中数据分析的基本方法。
courses.description_en: Teaching fundamental data analysis methods in design research.

courses.description_zh: 探索声音在设计中的应用与创作方法。
courses.description_en: Exploring the application and creative methods of sound in design.

gallery.caption_zh: 陶思旻声音设计工作坊

bio_en: Associate Professor of Practice at the College of Design and Innovation, Tongji University. She is the founder of THE MEME consultancy, working with clients including Microsoft, iRobot, and Samsung. She founded the 2nd NICE, a sustainable living organization. She holds a BFA from Seoul National University (SNU) and an MDes from Harvard Graduate School of Design. Her teaching and research focus on design-driven social entrepreneurship and sustainable design.

achievements.description_zh: 创立的可持续生活方式组织。
achievements.description_en: Founded organization promoting sustainable living practices.

courses.description_zh: 探讨设计如何驱动社会创业与可持续发展。
courses.description_en: Exploring how design drives social entrepreneurship and sustainable development.
